name_cn:
【Dynamic Chip 1st Tier Original】
Top-grain Leather M68746 Exclusive Original This Dauphine Chain Bag combines Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, gathering the series' iconic elements: vintage appearance, calfskin trim, and LV Circle hook. Spacious and sleek, it features a detachable chain strap for various carrying options. 18.5 x 12.0 x 5.0 cm (L x H x W)
	•	Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas
	•	Calfskin trim
	•	Microfiber lining
	•	LV logo lock
	•	Zip pocket
	•	Internal patch pocket
	•	Card slot
	•	Chain: Detachable
	•	Chain half-length: 53.0 cm
